summary.note: net_new = currently-independent locations sitting in a multi-location common-ownership cluster. HIGH = multi-key corroborated or known GP-DSO brand (promote after light web check). MEDIUM = single strong key (verify). LOW = name-only (Patel trap; never auto-flip). NOTHING here is classified yet -- this is a candidate map.
